title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 95.547 - Employees who may be covered (St. Louis City)
text:
95.547.  Employees who may be covered (St. Louis City). — The ordinance authorizing the insurance program may provide for the coverage within a single plan of municipal employees, public employees performing county functions within the city, employees of any municipally owned or operated public utility, and the employees of any independent public board or agency operating within the city under the authority of a statute of this state or ordinance of the city.
(L. 1971 H.B. 441 § 2)
